claim: GATA3 regulates cell cycle progression in bone marrow hematopoietic stem cells.
evidence_sentences: Furthermore, Gata3 mutant hematopoietic progenitor cells fail to be recruited into an increased cycling state after 5-fluorouracil-induced myelosuppression.
Therefore, GATA-3 is required for the maintenance of a normal number of LT-HSCs and for their entry into the cell cycle.
